  • Uses of ShotResult in com.example.battleship.controller

    Methods in com.example.battleship.controller with parameters of type ShotResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    CombatController.applyShotFeedback(javafx.scene.Group boardGroup, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, Position position, ShotResult result, Ship ship)
    Applies the correct 3D feedback for one resolved shot: a red X on the water for a miss, or -- via Ship3D.markHit(int) -- the matching wreckage/hull change on the ship that got hit.
    void

    ShotResult
    Game.fireAtMachine(Position target)
    Resolves a shot fired by the human player at the machine's board.
    ShotResult
    Game.ShotOutcome.result()
    Returns the value of the result record component.
    Methods in com.example.battleship.model with parameters of type ShotResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    Game.advanceTurnIfNeeded(ShotResult result)
    Passes Game.currentTurn to the other side, unless result grants the same shooter another shot (a hit or a sunk ship, per HU-2).

    Constructor

    Methods in com.example.battleship.model.board that return ShotResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ShotResult
    Board.receiveShot(Position position)
    Resolves a shot at the given position: marks the cell, updates the hit ship (if any), and notifies listeners.
